hero.tagline: Byakozwe mu bukungu bw'Ikimina u Rwanda
hero.title: Guhindura umurimo w'ubwigenge w'igihe kirekire muri Rwanda ukaba ari ingufu y'inguzanyo
hero.description: Muri buri week, miliyoni 5.9 abanyarwanda banga ibihano mu matsinda y'abanyamuryango, ariko amakuru yabo ari mu nyandiko. IkiminaPass ihindura imikorere y'itsinda, ihindura ibihano bya MoMo bikorwa otomatiki, kandi ikora score y'inguzanyo yemewe kuva kuri 0 kugeza kuri 850.

who_we_are.title: Turi nde
who_we_are.subtitle: Itsinda rize hamwe n'ikimina
who_we_are.description: IkiminaPass yashinzwe n'Abanyarwanda bari bagezeje ku matsinda y'ikimina mu muryango wabo imyaka myinyi. Tuzi iyi tradition uko uko - ubwemeye ikenewe, akazi akora, n'ubukana bugaragaza iyo uwemeye yabaye.
who_we_are.team_description: Turi itsinda rya fintekanyi rihuza ubumenyi bw'igihugu hamwe na teknoloji yo mu gihe hagiye - yakozwe kugira ngo serive abantu bakeneye cyane, siyo abafite uburenganzira bwibanza.

problem_solution.subtitle: Imyaka myinshi y'ubwigenge - ibitazwi n'ibanki
problem_solution.description: Matsinda y'ikimina yo mu Rwanda ari injini y'ihuriro ry'ibihano. Ariko igihe umunyamuryango yinjira muri banki akaba asaba inguzanyo, imyaka ye y'ibihano bya buri week nta kimwe, nta makuru amenyerewe, nta mateka y'inguzanyo, nta ubushakashatsi.
solution_points: Urupapuro rw'ikoranabuhanga ruri kuri interineti buri munyamuryango ashobora kureba muri real time
MoMo automation ivana umuntu wifashisha amafaranga
Score passport y'inguzanyo ikora kuva ku makuru ya transakisiyo nziza
Banki na SACCO ubu zishobora gutanga inguzanyo n'ubwemeye
Siseme y'ivanga icyo kibazo kugira ngo ibibazo byitwa n'uburyo bwiza

credit_passport.title: Passport y'Inguzanyo
credit_passport.subtitle: Mateka y'ibihano yawe, nyuma yaboneka n'ibanki
credit_passport.description: Nyuma amezi atatu gusa y'ibihano bya buri gihe, IkiminaPass ikora score yemewe ya passport y'inguzanyo kuva kuri 0 kugeza kuri 850 - ikorwa kuva ku makuru nziza za transakisiyo za MoMo yawe. Ushakisha n'iburihe banki, SACCO, cyangwa MFI kugira ngo ubone inguzanyo zemewe ku mafaranga meza.

digital_management.title: Imikorere y'itsinda rikora ikoranabuhanga
digital_management.desc: Hindura nyandiko urupapuro ruri kuri interineti ruzwi kandi rutazigira, buri munyamuryango ashobora kureba muri real time.

momo_payments.title: Amahurizi ya MoMo akorwa otomatiki
momo_payments.desc: Ibihano bigarukira kandi bigaragazwa bakoresheje MTN MoMo otomatiki - nta gukurikira, nta makenga.

credit_score.title: Score ya Passport y'Inguzanyo
credit_score.desc: Nyuma amezi atatu, buri munyamuryango akora score yemewe kuva kuri 0 kugeza kuri 850 ishyizweho na mateka ya transakisiyo nziza.

fund_protection.title: Ukurinda amafaranga
fund_protection.desc: Nta bagenzi b'ubwikuba bazarangira amafaranga y'itsinda. Buri faranga rurakurikirwa, rurandikwa, kandi rufite umwanzuro.

trust.title: Wakwemeye twebwe
trust.subtitle: Ubwemeye bwashyizwe muri iyi platforme ikora
trust.description: Ntidutanga gusaba kwemeye twebwe - twashije iyi platforme kugira ngo utagira kuba twumva amagambo yacu. Buri kurinda ni by'ingenzi, siyo gusa umugisha.

no_cash_handling.title: Nta faranga ihuje n'umugenzi b'ubwikuba
no_cash_handling.desc: Ibihano byose bigenda bakoresheje MTN MoMo - kuva kuri munyamuryango kugeza ku konti y'itsinda. Nta muntu w'ibyabo ukoresheje amafaranga.

every_member_sees.title: Buri munyamuryango araona buri transakisiyo
every_member_sees.desc: Urupapuro rw'itsinda ruzira kuri buri munyamuryango muri real time. Nta makuru ashobora guhindurwa atazwi n'abanyamuryango bose.

immutable_records.title: Makuru atazigira ashizweho na MoMo
immutable_records.desc: Buri transakisiyo ifite igihe kandi ishimwa bihagije. Makuru nta bisubirwo cyangwa bigahindurwa nyuma yo kugaragazwa.

treasurers_rewarded.title: Abagenzi b'ubwikuba bakizwa kuri ubunyangamugayo
treasurers_rewarded.desc: Twihaza abagenzi b'ubwikuba 35% by'amafaranga y'ibikorwa. Ukuri kwiza n'ubunyangamugayo birakizwa muri finans - siyo gusa bya ngombwa.

journey.title: Inzira
journey.subtitle: Kuva itsinda y'ibihano kugeza ku nguzanyo ya banki

cta_banner.title: Ushobora kwinjira itsinda yawe?
cta_banner.description: Injira muri ibihirwe bya matsinda y'ibihano yo mu Rwanda bigira mateka y'inguzanyo yemewe uyu munsi.

how_it_works.title: Ikikora
steps: Abanyamuryango bahanga buri week bakoresheje MTN MoMo
Nyuma amezi atatu, score passport y'inguzanyo ikorwa
Munyamuryango asangiza score na banki cyangwa SACCO
Ikigo gishinzwe imari itanga inguzanyo zemewe ku mafaranga meza

problems.title: Ibibazo
items: Abagenzi b'ubwikuba bazarangira amafaranga y'itsinda - abanyamuryango batura byose
Imyaka myinshi y'ubwigenge ibitazwi n'ibanki na SACCO
Nta mateka y'inguzanyo zemewe bivamo ko nta gucuruzi ku nguzanyo meza
Abanyamuryango bahana 10% buri kwezi ku bantu gutwara inguzanyo nk'ihindura gusa

about.title: Ibyerekeye IkiminaPass
about.subtitle: Kugira amafaranga y'ibihano by'umwuga w'Ikimina yo mu Rwanda aba azirikana, abizigira, kandi b'ingufu z'imari.

mission.title: Intego Yacu
mission.heading: Guhindura ubwigenge bw'ibihano mu Rwanda aba ikimenyeto cy'imari
mission.desc_1: Tubwira ko buri wumunyarwanda wongeye kuri buri gihe mu itsinda y'ikimina amezi cyangwa imyaka, ashobora kubona ko ubwigenge bwe bwemewe na sisitemu y'imari. IkiminaPass ihari kugira ngo ifunge icyo gicamo — ikoresheje ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo ibyo bitazwi bihindure, iby'umwuga bihindure abazigira, kandi ababuze bihindure.
mission.desc_2: Intego yacu ntiyongera gushyiraho softaware. Ni ukuhindura by'ingenzi uko abashobora kubona inguzanyo mu Rwanda — ukwerekana ko imyitwarire y'ibihano, nta mateka ya konti ya banki, ari ukuri kuri ukwizigira kw'imari.

who_we_are.title: Turi nde
who_we_are.heading: Itsinda rize hamwe n'ikimina
who_we_are.desc_1: IkiminaPass yashinzwe n'Abanyarwanda bari bagezeje ku itsinda y'ikimina mu muryango wabo imyaka myinyi. Tuzi iyi tradition uko uko - ubwemeye ikenewe, akazi akora, n'ubukana bugaragaza iyo uwemeye yabaye.
who_we_are.desc_2: Turi itsinda rya fintekanyi rihuza ubumenyi bw'igihugu hamwe na teknoloji yo mu gihe hagiye - yakozwe kugira ngo serive abantu bakeneye cyane, siyo abafite uburenganzira bwibanza.

problem.title: Ibibazo
problem.heading: Tuvana iki mu buzima
problem.desc: Sisitemu y'ikimina yo mu Rwanda ari imwe y'ibikoresho by'imari by'umwuga bikomeye ku isi. Ariko ifite ibibano bine by'ingenzi IkiminaPass yashyizweho gukora:

0.title: Amafaranga arangira n'abagenzi b'ubwikuba
0.desc: Mu matsinda y'ikimina y'igisanzwe, umugenzi b'ubwikuba afite amafaranga yose. Ariko aba arangira — kandi byaba — abanyamuryango batura byose, nta gushakira mu mategeko.

1.title: Nta mateka y'inguzanyo yemewe
1.desc: Imyaka myinshi y'ibihano bya buri gihe by'ubwemeye nta kimwe ku banki. Nta makuru yemewe, nta umubiri, nta kimwe cya inguzanyo - byavamo ko abanyamuryango batazi kubona inguzanyo zumwuga.

2.title: Abatwara inguzanyo bifatanije
2.desc: Nta gucuruzi ku nguzanyo zumwuga, abanyamuryango bagera ku bigo by'imari by'umwuga bikwira 10% buri kwezi cyangwa byinshi. Ikibazo gito cy'igihe kibasha umwanda w'inguzanyo y'igihe kirekire.

3.title: Makuru aragira kandi ashobora guhindurwa
3.desc: Umwandiko urangira, dosiye ya Excel ihinduka, kandi makuru ashobora guhindurwa. Nta gukurikira, nta by'ingenzi, kandi nta buryo bwo gukemura ibibazo neza.

solution.title: Ibyihutirwa Cacu
solution.heading: IkiminaPass ivana byose
points: MoMo automation ivana umuntu wifashisha amafaranga
Urupapuro rw'ikoranabuhanga rurakora mateka y'inguzanyo yemewe
Score passport y'inguzanyo itanga abanyamuryango gucuruzi ku nguzanyo zumwuga ku mafaranga meza
Makuru azirikanya na gukemura ibibazo ivana guhindura

trust.title: Wakwemeye twebwe
trust.heading: Wakwemeye IkiminaPass
trust.desc: Ubwemeye ntiyakwemera - ni ikintu twakira ku buryo iyi platforme yashyizweho. Niba wakwemeye by'ingenzi, abanyamuryango, abagenzi b'ubwikuba, n'ibigo by'imari bishobora kwihaza IkiminaPass:

reasons.0_desc: Ibihano byose bigenda bakoresheje MTN MoMo - kuva kuri munyamuryango kugeza ku konti y'itsinda. Nta muntu w'ibyabo ukoresheje amafaranga.
reasons.1_desc: Urupapuro rw'itsinda ruzira kuri buri munyamuryango muri real time. Nta makuru ashobora guhindurwa atazwi n'abanyamuryango bose.
reasons.2_desc: Buri transakisiyo ifite igihe kandi ishimwa bihagije. Makuru nta bisubirwo cyangwa bigahindurwa nyuma yo kugaragazwa.
reasons.3: Score ya passport y'inguzanyo yakorwa ku makuru nziza
reasons.3_desc: Score passport y'inguzanyo cacu ntiyibura ntiyitegerereza. Yakorwa kuva ku makuru za transakisiyo za MoMo zemejwe - ako ari na makuru banki na SACCO zishobora gusuzuma.

story.title: Amateka Cacu
story.heading: Wakozwe IkiminaPass
story.desc_1: Tubonye inkuru imwe na imwe igaragara vuba: umunyamuryango w'itsinda wongeye buri gihe imyaka ibiri, hanyuma ashaka inguzanyo kugira ngo agwire ibikorwa bye cyangwa gukemura ikibazo cya siyansi. Yinjira muri banki. Banki isaba mateka y'inguzanyo. Nta yo - cyane ko banki yaba ibona. Aza atagira amafaranga kandi agera ku muntu gutwara inguzanyo ku 10% buri kwezi.
story.desc_2: Muri iyi nshuro, umugenzi b'ubwikuba we afite umwandiko w'imyaka ibiri y'ibihano byiza. Uyu mwandiko nta kimwe ku banki. Yakozwe IkiminaPass kugira ngo ihindure iki - kugira ngo make makuru, kugira ngo ubwigenge bukomeze kugaragara, kandi gutanga buri wumubyaye umwemeyo w'imari yagize.

0.title: Itsinda ku mbere
0.desc: Yakozwe IkiminaPass kugira ngo serive miliyoni z'Abanyarwanda banga hamwe - siyo guhindura tradition, ahubwo kuyirinda no kongera ingufu.

1.title: Kwihaza imari
1.desc: Intego yacu ni ukugira inguzanyo zumwuga igaburirwe buri wumunyarwanda wongeye kuri buri gihe - yaba afite konti ya banki cyangwa atafite.

2.title: Ubwizigirwa bwuzuye
2.desc: Buri transakisiyo aragaragara ku buri munyamuryango. Nta bihano bihishwe, nta buryo bw'ikora butazwi. Ubwemeye bwakozwa ku gukora byose azirikanya kandi byemewe.

edge.title: Ingufu Cacu
edge.heading: Twihaza abagenzi b'ubwikuba kutwakwira
edge.desc: Platforme nyinshi twakwira abagenzi b'ubwikuba amafaranga yo gukoresha softaware yazo. Tukora ikinyuranyo. IkiminaPass ihaguranya 35% by'igihe cy'ibikorwa yifunzwe n'umugenzi b'ubwikuba - ikora injini y'ihuriro ihagira mu Rwanda aho ukuri n'ubunyangamugayo bikizwa muri finans.

services.title: Serivisi n'ibice
services.subtitle: Buri bice itsinda ukeneye kugira ngo bange amafaranga neza, ubizigira, no gukora ubwemeye bw'inguzanyo zumwuga.

digital_management.title: Ukorikani rwa itsinda rizira
digital_management.desc: Hindura umwandiko urupapuro ruri kuri interineti ruzwi kandi rutazigira, buri munyamuryango ashobora kureba muri real time.

momo_payments.title: Amahurizi ya MoMo akorwa otomatiki
momo_payments.desc: Ibihano bigarukira kandi bigaragazwa bakoresheje MTN MoMo - nta gukurikira, nta makenga.

credit_passport.title: Score ya Passport y'Inguzanyo (0 – 850)
credit_passport.desc: Ushakisha n'iburihe banki, SACCO, cyangwa MFI kugira ngo ubone inguzanyo zemewe ku mafaranga meza.

micro_loans.title: Inguzanyo nto z'ikibazo
micro_loans.desc: Abanyamuryango bashobora kubona inguzanyo nto z'ikibazo ziva mu mafaranga y'itsinda.

ussd_access.title: Kugera kuri USSD
ussd_access.desc: Kugera ku bice bisanzwe ku banyamuryango batagira telefoni ya smartphone bakoresheje kode USSD.

dispute_system.title: Sisitemu yo gukemura ibibazo
dispute_system.desc: Uburyo bwuzuye bwo gukemura ibibazo ku buryo buhoraho.

financial_institutions.title: Kugera ku bice by'ibigo by'imari
financial_institutions.subtitle: Kubona ibikurikira by'inguzanyo bya sector y'umwuga byemewe
financial_institutions.desc: Banki, SACCO, na MFI bashobora kubona raporo z'inguzanyo zemewe kugira ngo bacunze ibisubizo by'inguzanyo.

pricing.title: Amafaranga
pricing.subtitle: Plan zoroshye no azirikanya zihujwe ku matsinda y'ingano zose

standard.title: Ibisanzweho
standard.desc: Ku matsinda yashizwe zikaba kwishakira ibice byinshi

premium.title: Ibyiza
premium.desc: Ku bigo byinshi bifuje ibisabwa by'ingenzi

financial_institutions.title: Kugera ku bice by'ibigo by'imari
financial_institutions.desc: Kubona ibikurikira by'inguzanyo bya sector y'umwuga byemewe kugira ngo bacunze ibisubizo by'inguzanyo.

contact.title: Dufatanye n'ibyanyu
contact.subtitle: Menya umuryango wacu ku bijyanye no kwinjira itsinda, ubufasha, cyangwa ubufunganye bw'ibigo by'imari.

form.title: Tumva ubutumwa
form.desc: Dukunda gusubiza munsi y'imunsi imwe y'akazi.
form.name: Izina rya vuba
form.subject: Uko

info.address:
Kigali, Rwanda
KG XXX St, Gasabo District
info.partners_desc: Uri banki, MFI, cyangwa SACCO ufite kwishakira kubona ibikurikira by'inguzanyo bya sector y'umwuga byemewe?

how_it_works.title: IkiminaPass ikikora
how_it_works.subtitle: Kuva ibihano bya buri week by'umwuga kugeza ku gucuruzi ku nguzanyo zumwuga - urugendo roroshye, rizira neza.

steps.title: Itsinda rinjira muri IkiminaPass
steps.desc: Umugenzi b'ubwikuba akora konti y'itsinda, ashizaho amafaranga y'ibihano, igihe, kandi akita abanyamuryango.

steps.title: Abanyamuryango bongera kandi baremeza
steps.desc: Buri munyamuryango akira ubutumwa bwa SMS cyangwa USSD kugira ngo aremeze ubufatanye.

steps.title: Ibihano bigabanywa bakoresheje MTN MoMo
steps.desc: Umunsi w'ibihano, abanyamuryango baza guhabwa amafaranga ya MoMo bakoresheje otomatiki.

steps.title: Buri transakisiyo bandikwa otomatiki
steps.desc: Buri kwishura birarandikwa, biyemejwa, kandi bikandikwa muri urupapuro rwa ikoranabuhanga ruzira.

steps.title: Ibihano bya rotation bikorwa ikoranabuhanga
steps.desc: Igihe igihe cy'umunyamuryango guhabwa amafaranga, amafaranga aherezwa otomatiki bakoresheje MoMo.

steps.title: Score y'inguzanyo ikorwa otomatiki
steps.desc: Nyuma amezi atatu, score y'inguzanyo ya 0-850 ikorwa ikurikije amateka y'ibihano.

ussd.title: USSD (Internet nta kibyo)
ussd.desc: Kugera ku bice bisanzwe bakoresheje kode USSD

credit_passport.title: Passport y'Inguzanyo Yakorwe
credit_passport.desc: Nyaha amezi atatu gusa y'ibihano, buri munyamuryango akira score y'inguzanyo yemewe
